name: mcp-steam-scout
description: MCP server + Claude Code skills for cross-platform game recommendations

plugins.name: game-selector
plugins.description: Recommends games by cross-referencing your Steam, PSN, Xbox, Epic, and GOG libraries with current trends

plugins.name: mcp-steam-scout-setup
plugins.description: Guides you through setting up all platform tokens (Steam, PSN, Xbox, Epic, GOG) and configuring the mcp-steam-scout MCP server
